item.title: ⚠️ 本地 Runner 离线 | 07月08日
item.description:
⚠️ 本地 Runner 离线，今日仅包含 B站更新。小红书、知乎、RSS 源暂不可用。

请检查本地 PC 是否开机且网络正常，恢复后将自动补全。
item.author: AI Digest Bot

item.title: [B站] 量化投资邢不行啊：A股唯一不骗人的技术指标?收割量化资金的终极战法?量比指标真有这么神奇吗?Python量化热门大师指标,1000万条数据揭秘网红战法真相 | 量化投资邢不行啊
item.description:
📱 平台：B站

✍️ 作者：量化投资邢不行啊

谨记网上大师千千万， 论看图说话都是王者， 但凡经历大数据拷打， 十有八九会露出破绽。 喜欢视频记得三连，并点个关注～ 往期视频精选： 涨停基因战法：BV1iwG16QEvJ 2560冠军策略：BV1wS516qEhB 同花顺股神策略：BV1sWQ7BHExm

item.title: [B站] 硅谷101：Tokenmaxxing后的理智与Agent落地｜探展亚马逊云科技中国峰会【硅谷101】
item.description:
📱 平台：B站

✍️ 作者：硅谷101

2026年过半，AI行业的关键词正在从“堆Token、做Demo”转向“交付结果”。 在亚马逊云科技中国峰会现场，我们和一线产品与技术人员聊了聊Agent真正进入产业后的变化：小说作者如何把故事变成AI短剧，普通投资者如何用自然语言做量化回测，药物研发如何被打通成更低门槛的工作流，不会写代码的人如何几分钟生成游戏，企业又如何用AI对抗AI带来的安全风险。 当Agent接入各行各业，AI不再只是

查看原文 →
item.author: 硅谷101

item.title: [B站] 硅谷101：美国AI研究员的中国之旅：年轻人，追赶者，算力焦虑与“AGI展示厅” ｜专访Nathan Lambert【101视频播客】
item.description:
📱 平台：B站

✍️ 作者：硅谷101

2026年4月，美国AI研究者Nathan Lambert来到中国，走访了阿里巴巴、月之暗面、智谱、清华、美团、小米、蚂蚁、零一万物等AI团队。 他说：“能见到这些技术背后的人，我真的很高兴。” 作为长期关注开放模型的研究者，他想知道的不是某一个模型到底强不强，而是这些模型背后的组织和产业生态，究竟是如何运转的。 在他看来，中国AI正在被重新理解。它不只是DeepSeek之后的短暂热潮，也不

查看原文 →
item.author: 硅谷101

item.title: [X] AI教育实践 (2026-07-02): 6 posts
item.description:
AI教育实践 · 1位作者 · 6条

Ethan Mollick · 6条
  • R to @emollick: I predict organizations of agents will outperform pure task-based routers on price/performance.
  • Formal organizational structures are a useful way to think about the challenges of agents. They provide a template to thinking about how work gets delegated up and down between smart expensive agents & cheaper weaker ones, as well as between narrow specialists & generalists.
  • Just tweeting while waiting for my Fable runs to finish.
  • The discussion here on AI futures can be a little too credulous of company visions. People tend to push what they have. The three big AI labs will say bigger models are the future. Every other firm has only small models to sell, so they will tell you small models are the future.
  • It would be good to have an official government statement about the risks they saw in Fable, how they are viewing defensive preparations in light of coming open weights Mythos-class models, & whether the worries are state actors, independent hackers, etc It’s important to know
  • You really need to benchmark models for your use case. As soon as judgements & decisions stack on top of each other, the differences between models amplifies, and no standard benchmark will tell you that Gemini 3.1 is less worried about financial losses at a cafe than GPT-5.5
item.author: AI教育实践

item.title: [X] AI资讯聚合 (2026-07-02): 3 posts
item.description:
AI资讯聚合 · 2位作者 · 3条

Dwarkesh Patel
  • Mathlib is Lean library that has formalized a lot of humanity's math concepts and proofs. Grant speculated about a really interesting possibility: You could just have different AIs fork MathLib and build their own parallel math civilization. Lean guarantees that whatever new conjectures they come up with would be logically valid. Whether they'd be interesting is another matter. But as AIs develop better and better taste, why wouldn't they be? "That's a very unique thing that math has that nothing else has, where you could press go and just pour compute at it, look away for ten years, and then come back and say, 'What do you have? There's going to be something." I love this as a metaphor for what's going to happen to our civilization overall. For millennia, humanity has built this corpus of knowledge that is now being distilled into these models. At some point, the models will just extend that arbitrarily.
AK (论文速递) · 2条
  • RT by @_akhaliq: I'm going to try the new @NVIDIAAI Nemotron-3-Nano-30B-A3B and compare it to Qwen 3.6 35B in agentic workflows. https://huggingface.co/nvidia/Nemotron-Labs-TwoTower-30B-A3B-Base-BF16
  • RT by @_akhaliq: Check it out on @huggingface👇 https://huggingface.co/nvidia/Nemotron-Labs-TwoTower-30B-A3B-Base-BF16
item.author: AI资讯聚合

item.title: [X] AI公司官方 (2026-07-02): 5 posts
item.description:
AI公司官方 · 2位作者 · 5条

Anthropic
  • RT by @AnthropicAI: Fable 5 is back.
NVIDIA AI · 4条
  • R to @huggingface: And you can find the paper here https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.26493
  • We took a 30B model and split it in two to write tokens in parallel instead of one at a time. Introducing Nemotron-Labs-TwoTower: a diffusion language model from NVIDIA Research adapted from Nemotron-3-Nano-30B-A3B. Here’s how it works: one half holds the context, the other writes the tokens, with both reusing the pretrained model instead of training a new one from scratch. We found it kept 98.7% of the original model’s quality at 2.42× faster generation.
  • RT by @NVIDIAAI: .@OpenAI GPT OSS and @NVIDIA Nemotron 3 open-weight models are now available on Amazon Bedrock in AWS GovCloud (US), now with FedRAMP High and DoD IL-4/5 approval.
  • The Real World Is a Bad Teacher: How to Train for the Edge Cases Your Data Missed
item.author: AI公司官方

item.title: [X] AI公司掌门 (2026-07-02): 2 posts
item.description:
AI公司掌门 · 1位作者 · 2条

Clem (HF CEO) · 2条
  • AI systems that are accessible or even better open-source are safer for a simple reason: more people can inspect them, test them, stress them, and report what breaks or harms to keep the builders accountable. "Sunlight is the best disinfectant"! That’s why we’re proud to help lead FLARE with a coalition of safety and cyber-security researchers from MIT, Stanford, Princeton, Harvard, Northeastern, Carnegie Mellon and more. The first release is a standardized way to report AI flaws across the ecosystem. One report can reach the right developers, safety organizations, and registries, so a flaw found once can be fixed everywhere faster with the right accountability: https://www.wired.com/story/flare-website-ai-flaw-reporting-safety/
  • RT by @ClementDelangue: Here's Pivot 0.5, our first trained model! ✨ Try our research preview for free already. Open weights coming to @huggingface soon! 🤗
item.author: AI公司掌门

item.title: [X] AI资讯聚合 (2026-07-01): 3 posts
item.description:
AI资讯聚合 · 1位作者 · 3条

AK (论文速递) · 3条
  • R to @_akhaliq: paper: https://huggingface.co/papers/2604.17931
  • LiteResearcher A Scalable Agentic RL Training Framework for Deep Research Agent
  • RT by @_akhaliq: Talk to Gemma 4 31B with our voice app! It sees and searches the web faster than you blink. Thanks to @cerebras’ ultra fast inference, the LLM is almost instantaneous. The whole stack is fully open-source, and is a drop-in replacement for OpenAI's realtime API. Demo: https://huggingface.co/spaces/smolagents/hf-realtime-voice
item.author: AI资讯聚合

item.title: [X] AI研究核心 (2026-07-01): 2 posts
item.description:
AI研究核心 · 2位作者 · 2条

Francois Chollet
  • RT by @fchollet: On the pod: "Constrained Adaptive Rejection Sampling" with @ucsd_cse professor @lorisdanto. Hear how symbolic AI experts have navigated the LLM era and why the future of AI code generation depends on program synthesis and formal methods.
Jim Fan
  • ENPIRE -> ASPIRE, our 2nd work in the series for Physical AutoResearch. We are building the components for robot self-improvement, one /skill at a time.
item.author: AI研究核心

item.title: [X] AI公司官方 (2026-07-01): 4 posts
item.description:
AI公司官方 · 1位作者 · 4条

xAI · 4条
  • R to @xai: Most voice stacks stitch together three APIs: speech-to-text, a language model, and text-to-speech—often with each stage hosted by a different provider. Every hop adds cost, latency, and new failure modes. Voice Agent Builder is one interface built for Grok Voice, tightly coupled to the model.
  • R to @xai: Every account includes a free phone number to get started. We're launching today in beta: Try it now → http://console.x.ai/voice/agents Read more → http://x.ai/news/grok-voice-agent-builder
  • Introducing Voice Agent Builder: a no-code platform to create human-like voice agents with Grok Voice. Available today at $0.05 / min. http://x.ai/voice
  • R to @xai: It's for operators and developers who want production voice agents without building from scratch. Comes with telephony, knowledge retrieval, tools, guardrails, and observability. You can also use what you already have: Bring existing phone numbers, APIs, and MCPs.
item.author: AI公司官方
